summary: Visual-polish follow-up for the 4 strategic reference pages verified end-to-end on the preview URL (cabinet@metfpa.ci / Metfpa@2026Demo). All 6 acceptance criteria pass: (1) /pnd-402 renders page-pnd with green top accent rgb(0,135,81), h1 'Vue PND 4.02', PageHeader title 'Secteur 4.02 — Enseignement Technique et Formation Professionnelle', exactly 3 MetricCards (Effets/Produits/Budget=1 202,1 milliards FCFA), HierTree renders chain Pilier P4 → Secteur 4.02 → Effets 4.02.1/2/3, single DataStatusBanner at top, zero purple hits. (2) /politique-eftp renders page-politique with orange top accent rgb(244,124,32), 5 MetricCards (Période/Axes/Produits/Actions/Budget total), axe-link-AX1/AX2/AX3 all visible with PND-effet mapping, Axe→Produit→Action HierTree present, FR money formatting. (3) /strategie-digitale renders page-digital with financing-bar/annual-profile/priorities/digital-indicators all present, dig-axe-D1/D2/D3 accordion items present, D1 toggles (202px → 49px on collapse and re-expands on second click), milliards FCFA FR formatting. (4) /alignement renders page-alignement with alignment-legend, alignment-AX1/AX2/AX3 cards (PND→Politique mapping with 'contribue à' arrow), 3 alignment-anchor-* digital anchor blocks, FR money formatting. (5) CONSISTENCY: all 4 pages share the institutional look (white surface, thin top accent line, dark ink text, gold/green/orange/blue accents), each PageHeader title is unique and distinct, zero purple (#6E40C9/rgb 110,64,201) hits across the 4 pages, no console errors, no page errors. (6) REGRESSION: sidebar Référentiels group exposes nav-pnd, nav-politique, nav-digital, nav-alignement — clicking each navigates correctly; header-sidebar-toggle still collapses/expands (data-collapsed true ↔ false) while on /pnd-402.

/strategie-digitale.dig_axe_D1_toggle: Height 202px (expanded by default) → 49px after 1st click (collapsed) → grows again after 2nd click — accordion toggle works

critical_code_review_comments: VuePND.jsx (53 lines), PolitiqueEFTP.jsx (70), StrategieDigitale.jsx, Alignement.jsx all use shared components/Institutional.jsx primitives (PageHeader, InstitutionalSection, MetricCard, DataStatusBanner) — DRY achieved, flat card structure (no nested bordered cards inside hero).
Institutional.PageHeader uses the framework accent only on the eyebrow color; main title uses var(--ink-900) — consistent dark-ink hierarchy across PND green / POL orange / DIG blue.
Hero top accent verified at runtime: PND rgb(0,135,81) ✓, POL rgb(244,124,32) ✓. Both pages use border-t-[3px] with style={{borderTopColor: color}} — implementation matches spec.
Single DataStatusBanner per page (banner_count=1 on all 4) — no duplicated/repeated banner.
Zero purple hits (#6E40C9 / rgb(110,64,201)) audited via computed-style scan on all 4 pages — de-purpling holds.
FR money formatting consistent: 'X XXX,Y milliards FCFA' present on PND/POL/Digital/Alignement; zero 'Bn'/'Md' occurrences.

Sidebar Référentiels group remains intact (nav-pnd, nav-politique, nav-digital, nav-alignement) and navigation to each route works; header-sidebar-toggle continues to collapse/expand on these pages — no regression from iteration_8.

Minor nit (not blocking): /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references the old PND/ministre@pnd.ci credentials. Should be refreshed to METFPA credentials (cabinet@metfpa.ci / direction.daf@metfpa.ci / validateur@metfpa.ci / admin@metfpa.ci — Metfpa@2026Demo) for future testing agents.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 6/6 acceptance criteria passed across the 4 reference pages and the sidebar regression

test_credentials: cabinet@metfpa.ci / Metfpa@2026Demo (Lecteur Cabinet — read access to all 4 reference pages, lands on /pilotage-directeur).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference pages all use components/Institutional.jsx: PageHeader (eyebrow + h1 + description + actions), InstitutionalSection (titled card with left-border-accent), MetricCard (rounded label/value/hint), DataStatusBanner (single demo banner at page top). Framework accent colors via frameworkColor(): PND=rgb(0,135,81) green, POL=rgb(244,124,32) orange, DIG=rgb(31,111,235) blue. Hero card pattern: <div className='bg-[var(--surface)] rounded-[10px] border border-[var(--border)] border-t-[3px] p-6' style={borderTopColor: color}>. data-testid catalogue confirmed live: page-pnd, page-politique, page-digital, page-alignement, demo-banner, axe-link-AX1/AX2/AX3, financing-bar, annual-profile, priorities, digital-indicators, dig-axe-D1/D2/D3 (D1 expanded by default; click toggles), alignment-legend, alignment-AX1/AX2/AX3, alignment-anchor-* (3 visible). Cabinet sidebar exposes nav-pnd, nav-politique, nav-digital, nav-alignement in the Référentiels group. Screenshots in /app/.screenshots/ref_pages/. Note: page.screenshot() needs type='jpeg' when using quality= param (PNG rejects quality).
rca of the issue: n/a — visual polish for the 4 reference pages fully landed; no defects found.
